interpretation: A Python-based spec-refinement pipeline that orchestrates three LLM calls in parallel, scores outputs heuristically, and merges them via an arbiter model call.

must: Parallel invocation of 3 LLM models with distinct role prompts
Heuristic scoring of each expansion on clarity, feasibility, coverage, consistency, specificity
Arbiter model synthesises scored expansions into a single refined spec
should: JSON schema validation at every pipeline boundary
Cost tracking with configurable cap ($5 default for ideation)
could: Retry with validation-error injection on schema failures

assumptions.assumption: All three model CLIs (claude, codex, gemini) are installed and on PATH
Network latency is acceptable for parallel calls (~10-30s)

open_questions.question: Should we cache expansion results to avoid re-calling on minor feedback?
open_questions.default_answer: No, re-expand each time for freshness

risks.risk: Model API rate limits during parallel calls
Schema validation rejects valid creative output
risks.suggestion: One retry with error context injected into prompt

success_criteria: Pipeline completes in under 60 seconds for a typical idea
All output artifacts pass JSON schema validation
